overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda showing the protagonist Link climbing a snowy mountain face at night. The character ascends steep rocky terrain under a starry sky with light snowfall, transitioning from a high-angle camera view to a closer third-person perspective as they navigate the mountain's ridges and approach a cave entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep snowy cliff face with narrow ledges

agents.ego_description: climbing steadily up the vertical cliff face using hands and feet along narrow snow-dusted ledges

entered.detail: vertical rock wall with snow patches that the character is actively climbing
steep snow-covered slope visible to the left of the climbing path
dark night sky filled with visible stars above the mountain
snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a high-angle third-person view of the character climbing a steep cliff face at night. The character ascends narrow ledges on the rock wall with a snow-covered slope visible to the left and distant mountain peaks under a starry sky in the background.

events.description: camera shifts from high-angle overhead view to close third-person perspective behind the character as they reach the cliff top
character stops walking along the ridge and begins climbing the next cliff section

agents.ego_description: reaches the summit of the first cliff, walks briefly along the snowy ridge, then begins ascending the next rock face

entered.detail: flat snow-covered summit area at the top of the first cliff

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions to a close third-person view as the character reaches the cliff summit. The character walks along the snowy ridge top under the open starry sky before approaching and beginning to climb the next section of the mountain.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper mountain face with cave entrance

events.description: character approaches a dark cave entrance visible in the rock wall to the left

agents.ego_description: climbing the upper mountain face toward a cave entrance, using handholds on the rocky surface

entered.detail: rock wall section above the ridge, being climbed in close third-person view
dark opening in the rock wall becoming visible as the character ascends

segments.scene_description: The character continues climbing the upper mountain face in a close third-person view. A dark cave entrance becomes visible on the left side of the frame and grows larger as the character approaches it, while distant mountains remain visible in the background under the starry night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character ascends a steep, snowy mountain face at night, transitioning from a wide cliffside climb to the discovery of a hidden cave. It begins with a high-angle view of the character scaling narrow rocky ledges against a backdrop of distant peaks and a starry sky. As the character reaches the summit, the camera shifts to a closer third-person perspective, following them as they traverse a snowy ridge top before beginning a second ascent. The scene then progresses further up the mountain face, where the open night sky remains visible while a dark cave entrance emerges on the left. The camera continues its forward momentum, drawing closer to the cavern's mouth as the character nears the mountain's interior.
